evidence.q2: "Personal Data" defined in Section 2: 'Personal Data' means information relating to an identified or identifiable person... ; later used: 'Vendor will process Personal Data only to provide, secure, support, and improve the services...' (Section 3).
evidence.q3: 'Vendor will notify Customer within 24 hours after discovering a Personal Data Breach.'
evidence.q4: 'Vendor will process Personal Data only to provide, secure, support, and improve the services for Customer and will not use Personal Data for Vendor's own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, advertising, or other independent business purposes.'
evidence.q5: 'Vendor will limit Personal Data access to personnel who need it to perform the services.'
evidence.q6: Section 3: 'Vendor will process Personal Data only to provide, secure, support, and improve the services...'; Section 11: 'Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report...'
